calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-10-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge David M. Porter, clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant 1050 17th Street appears in Pro Per through Patrick Harty; Respondents, Craig Waldo & Robert Head, appears in Pro Per. Parties and witnesses previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
Lea Bedford and Steve Velle, testify on behalf of the Appellants.
Leif Smith, testifies on behalf of the Respondents.
EXHR(1) Copy of law suit re another case against the appellants
(several loose unmarked documents that the clerk was not asked to identify, appear to belong to the Appellants, and were put in an Appellant's exhibit envelope.)
9:55am
Case is submitted, new evidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Judgment Entered
